notes.en: [[character:gorou]] is a Support character that can give increasing buffs to your party members from his [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]] based on the number of [[element:geo]] characters in your team (capped at 3). Casting his [[ability:skill]] sets up a banner which gives [[stat:def]] (1 Geo), Interruption Resistance (2 Geo) and [[stat:geo-dmg]] Bonus (3 Geo) for your active character standing inside the banner radius.

Casting his [[ability:burst]] creates a field following the active character which deals periodic damage and offers the same bonuses given by the [[ability:skill, destroying any placed banners in the process, it also pulls in nearby Elemental Shards created by [[element:crystallize]] reactions.

Due to his kit focusing on buffing [[stat:def%|DEF]] and [[stat:geo-dmg]], he's a specialised support geared towards [[element:geo]] DPS that scales with [[stat:def%|DEF]], such as [[character:noelle]] or [[character:arataki-itto]]. He can see niche use at **[C6]** with other [[element:geo]] characters as well.

**[C2]** extends the duration of [[character:gorou]]'s [[ability:burst]] from 9 seconds to 12 seconds if you can obtain the required [[element:crystallize]] shields. This allows his teammates to gain the 3 [[element:geo]] 15% [[stat:geo-dmg]] bonus for a longer duration, so it's preferable to use [[ability:burst]] as your last ability before swapping into your DPS.
